texto: I'm coming with you.” Riley insisted. “I've got a bulletproof vest and I'm a better sharpshooter than you. Don't mess with me.” Riley pushed past them and out the sliding exit doors.Stella turned to Stan, horrified. “Don't give me that look, Stells.” Stan muttered, following Riley. “Look at it this way, if the whole sharpshooter thing turns out to be a lie, she can pinch the hell out of anyone.”~Riley Pembroke, Stan Darrow, "Sugar and Spies: Spy Sisters Book 1
explicacao: Citação de Rebekah Martin sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I'm coming with you.” Riley insisted. “I've got a bulletproof vest and I'm a better sharpshooter …” articula sucesso, fight, gun em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como gun e pinch.
